core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Wine Heritage x Financial Precision
Content is King: The proposal is a story, not a list

headings.usage: All section titles, hero text, and big statements. Use italics for emphasis.

primary.name: Merlot Deep
primary.usage: Primary buttons, active states, key backgrounds

layout_strategies.grid_system: Bento Grid (Mode A) for Deliverables, Split Screen for Hero
layout_strategies.spacing: Generous. Minimum p-12 for sections. Gap-8 for grids.

buttons.primary: bg-[#4A0404] text-[#F9F8F4] hover:bg-[#2A0202] rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-serif uppercase tracking-widest text-sm border border-[#4A0404] transition-all duration-300 hover:tracking-[0.2em]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-[#4A0404] border border-[#4A0404] hover:bg-[#4A0404] hover:text-[#F9F8F4] rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-serif uppercase tracking-widest text-sm transition-all

cards.style: Flat, Cream background with thin Gold (#C5A059) border (1px). No shadow by default. Hover: shadow-2xl and slight lift.
cards.methodology: Glassmorphism with 'bottle glass' texture effect (backdrop-blur-md bg-white/10 border-white/20)

inputs.style: bg-transparent border-b border-[#4A0404]/30 focus:border-[#4A0404] focus:ring-0 rounded-none px-0 py-4 placeholder:text-[#4A0404]/40 font-serif

visual_enhancers.textures: Add a subtle 'noise' or 'paper grain' overlay to the #F9F8F4 background to avoid digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.timeline_style: The 'Vine' Concept. A vertical SVG line that meanders like a grape vine. Nodes are 'grapes' or gold circles.
visual_enhancers.investment_display: Design as a 'Financial Ledger' or 'Sommelier Menu'. Minimalist lines, serif numbers, right-aligned currency.

motion.entrance: Staggered fade-up for text. 'Draw' animation for the timeline SVG path.
motion.scroll: Parallax effect on background vineyard images.

hero_bg.style: Darkened, used as texture or split layout visual

brazil_market.style: Grayscale or Duotone (Burgundy tint) to blend with design

logos.client: Use placeholder 'Grupo Upper Blanc' serif typography if image missing
logos.agency: Use placeholder 'WTF Agency' bold sans if image missing

hero.headline: Desarrollo Integral Marca de Vinos para Brasil
hero.subheadline: De concepto a líder de mercado - USD 7,500/mes

timeline.title: Roadmap de 12 Meses
timeline.style: Vertical scrolling timeline with interactive hover states on milestones

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text.
Interactive elements must have hover states (color shift or scale).
Use 'sonner' for toast notifications on form submit.
Responsive: Stack columns on mobile, generous margins.
